highlights: Jupiter enters Leo on Jun 29 — expansion shifts to creativity, courage, self-expression
Mercury turns retrograde in Cancer on Jun 29 (to Jul 23) — review home, family, old conversations
Chiron enters Taurus on Jun 19 — healing themes move to money, values, the body

_meta.disclaimer: Astrology and crystal meanings are offered for entertainment, reflection, and spiritual inspiration. Crystals carry traditional symbolic qualities but are not a substitute for medical, financial, or professional advice.
_meta.source: 星象数据参考-2026-2027.md (交叉核对 Cafe Astrology/Astro-Seek/CHANI/NASA) + 模板-星座运势×水晶框架

signs.name: Aries
signs.theme: The Gemini New Moon (Jun 14) activates your third house of communication, learning, short trips. Momentum builds, but Mercury turns retrograde on the 29th — review and refine rather than push.

crystal_of_month.name: Carnelian
crystal_of_month.reason: Carnelian fuels the confident self-expression the Gemini New Moon asks of your third house — and keeps momentum when Mercury slows.

love.text: Your third house keeps relationships in motion. Pause before committing during the retrograde; reconnect after the Full Moon.

career.text: The Capricorn Full Moon (Jun 29) brings a career or structure moment. Solidify what the New Moon started, release what is not working.

wellness.text: Chiron entering Taurus on the 19th invites a gentler pace. Rest is productive this month — protect your sleep and body rituals.

spirituality.text: The retrograde favors inner work. Journaling, dream notes, and time alone sharpen the intuition the New Moon is opening.

signs.affirmation: I act on what matters and release what does not.

key_dates.focus: Set intentions around communication, learning, short trips

key_dates.avoid: Forcing closure before it is ready

signs.name: Taurus
signs.theme: The Gemini New Moon (Jun 14) activates your second house of money, values, self-worth. Slow, tangible progress unfolds, but Mercury turns retrograde on the 29th — review and refine rather than push.

crystal_of_month.name: green-aventurine
crystal_of_month.reason: With Chiron entering your sign this month, Green Aventurine grounds the second-house money theme in calm abundance rather than anxiety.

love.text: Your second house keeps relationships in motion. Pause before committing during the retrograde; reconnect after the Full Moon.

career.text: The Capricorn Full Moon (Jun 29) brings a career or structure moment. Solidify what the New Moon started, release what is not working.

wellness.text: Chiron entering Taurus on the 19th invites a gentler pace. Rest is productive this month — protect your sleep and body rituals.

spirituality.text: The retrograde favors inner work. Journaling, dream notes, and time alone sharpen the intuition the New Moon is opening.

signs.affirmation: I build steadily and trust the value I carry.

key_dates.focus: Set intentions around money, values, self-worth

key_dates.avoid: Forcing closure before it is ready
